issues.message: Raw <div> used instead of a Marigold component.
issues.suggestion: Raw <div> used instead of a Marigold layout component. Search the Marigold docs for layout alternatives.

issues.message: Raw <div> used instead of a Marigold component.
issues.suggestion: Raw <div> used instead of a Marigold layout component. Search the Marigold docs for layout alternatives.

issues.message: Inline style on <div> bypasses the design system (flex).
issues.suggestion: Use Marigold layout components (Stack, Columns, Inset, Container) and theme tokens instead of inline styles.

issues.message: Raw <div> used instead of a Marigold component.
issues.suggestion: Raw <div> used instead of a Marigold layout component. Search the Marigold docs for layout alternatives.

issues.message: Inline style on <div> bypasses the design system (flex).
issues.suggestion: Use Marigold layout components (Stack, Columns, Inset, Container) and theme tokens instead of inline styles.

issues.message: Computed background-color value "oklab(0.999994 0.0000455678 0.0000200868 / 0.9)" on <thead> (“EventDateVenueTickets SoldStatus”) does not map to a known design token.
issues.suggestion: If this is intentional, ignore the warning. Otherwise, use a Marigold variant or a theme-rui token instead of a hard-coded value.

details.selector: body:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > main:nth-child(3) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(4) > div:nth-child(2) > table:nth-child(3) > thead:nth-child(1)

issues.message: <Stack> wraps a single child. A flow layout earns its place only with two or more children; with one child it adds a wrapper that does nothing.
issues.suggestion: Render the child directly instead of wrapping it in <Stack>. For single-child spacing use Inset, Center, Breakout or Aspect.

issues.message: <Inline> wraps a single child. A flow layout earns its place only with two or more children; with one child it adds a wrapper that does nothing.
issues.suggestion: Render the child directly instead of wrapping it in <Inline>. For single-child spacing use Inset, Center, Breakout or Aspect.

issues.message: Touch target too small at mobile (375px): a elements are 68x20px (minimum 24x24px per WCAG 2.5.8).
issues.suggestion: Increase the clickable area. Marigold interactive components have built-in minimum sizes — check if custom styling reduces the target.

issues.message: Page should contain a level-one heading (page-has-heading-one)
issues.suggestion: Add a `<Headline level={1}>` component for the page title — it renders an `<h1>`. Import Headline from `@marigold/components`.

issues.message: Interactive element <a> (button) is not reachable via Tab key.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the element is focusable. Marigold interactive components are focusable by default — check if a parent has tabindex="-1" or focus is trapped.

details.selector: body:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > aside:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > nav:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > a:nth-child(1)

issues.message: Interactive element <button> (button) is not reachable via Tab key.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the element is focusable. Marigold interactive components are focusable by default — check if a parent has tabindex="-1" or focus is trapped.
